svg.aria-label: 30 debate sound form engine preview without common frame

g.desc: Reversible Sound Form Engine. A 100-pass audio-fingerprint morphology search and a 30-pass structural self-debate choose one of twelve macro forms. Different songs and variants therefore change the large structure, not only the line texture. Restoration PCM is added as pcm_reversible_data on export.
